results.title: PS6 Release Date Pushed Ahead To 2028? Here's What We Know So Far
results.description: The PlayStation 6, Sony's upcoming console, has been a topic of speculation, especially regarding its launch timeline. Initially anticipated for late 2027, recent news suggests that the PS6's release may be pushed back to after 2028 due to the PS5's strong sales performance and extended lifecycle.

results.title: This Delhi art exhibition spotlights Abdul Aziz Raiba’s work on Indian modernism
results.description: A.A. Raiba’s artworks from the 1950s and 60s are on display at this Delhi exhibition

results.title: Did Lisa Just Make FIFA World Cup History? BLACKPINK Star Pulls Off Major First At Opening Ceremony
results.description: BLACKPINK's Lisa performed Goals, a track featured on the tournament’s official album. The post Did Lisa Just Make FIFA World Cup History? BLACKPINK Star Pulls Off Major First At Opening Ceremony appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
